chatbot.title: CarePlus Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: AI Virtual Receptionist
chatbot.greeting: Hi there! I'm your CarePlus AI Assistant. How can I help you today? I can help you book, reschedule, or cancel appointments.
chatbot.fallback:
I didn't fully understand. I can help you with:
• Booking appointments
• Cancelling appointments
• Viewing your schedule

Try saying: 'Book appointment for tomorrow'

booking.askDepartment: Which department or specialty are you looking for?
booking.askDoctor: Who would you like to see?
booking.askDate: What day would you like to come in?
booking.success:
✅ **Appointment Confirmed!** Booked for **{{date}}** at **{{time}}**.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
booking.noDepartment: We don't currently have a {{specialty}} department. Please choose from our available departments.
booking.noDoctors: I'm sorry, there are no available doctors in this clinic right now.
booking.fullDay: I'm sorry, but there are no slots remaining for this doctor on this day. Please choose another date or doctor.

cancel.askWhich: Which appointment would you like to cancel?
cancel.success: ✅ Your appointment has been successfully cancelled. Let me know if you need to reschedule.
cancel.useButtons: Please use the option buttons to select the appointment to cancel.
cancel.noActive: You have no active appointments to cancel.

errors.generic: I encountered a system error. Please try again later.
errors.dbConnection: I'm having trouble connecting to our system right now.
errors.lostTrack: I seem to have lost track of our conversation. How can I help you today?
errors.useButtons: Please use the provided buttons to continue the process.

reschedule.selectExisting: Which appointment would you like to reschedule?
reschedule.unavailable: I'm sorry, but that slot is no longer available. Here are some alternative times:
reschedule.success: 📅 Appointment updated successfully! New date: **{{date}}**, Time: **{{time}}**.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
